vocab.meaning: khung cảnh nền đẹp đến nín thở
vocab.example: The snow-capped mountains provided a breathtaking backdrop for my photography session yesterday.
I prefer taking scenery pictures because the natural light source at dusk creates such soft and warm tones.
When I photograph a landscape, I pay close attention to the visual composition to lead the viewer's eye into the frame.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp nguyên sơ (chưa bị con người can thiệp)
vocab.example: There is something incredibly satisfying about capturing the unspoilt beauty of a remote, hidden valley.
I love taking photos that show a stark contrast between the deep blue sea and the white limestone cliffs.

vocab.meaning: điểm nhấn/điểm hội tụ của bức ảnh
vocab.example: In this particular shot, the solitary lighthouse serves as a powerful focal point against the vast ocean.

vocab.meaning: bầu không khí gợi cảm xúc
vocab.example: The thick fog over the lake created an evocative atmosphere that was perfect for moody landscape photography.

vocab.meaning: góc quan sát/vị trí có tầm nhìn đẹp
vocab.example: We hiked for three hours to reach a scenic outlook that commanded a view of the entire coastline.
Autumn is my favorite season for photography because of the harmonious colors of the falling leaves.
The sunset over the desert was an unforgettable vista that I managed to capture with my wide-angle lens.
